items.prompt: I wish I ____ more time to review before the test.
items.note: Use past form after wish for an unreal present situation.

items.prompt: If I had known, I ____ called you earlier.
items.note: Third conditional uses would have + past participle.

items.prompt: The room ____ cleaned when we arrived.
items.note: The cleaning was completed before another past event.

items.prompt: She ____ be at home. The lights are off.
items.note: Use can't for negative logical deduction.

items.prompt: He is said ____ the company in 2020.
items.note: Use to have + past participle when the reported action happened earlier.

items.prompt: You ____ smoke here. It is forbidden.
items.note: Mustn't means prohibition; don't have to means no obligation.
